headline: How The Intuit (INTU) Story Is Shifting Around AI Risk And Valuation Resets
summary: Intuit's updated fair value estimate shifted from US$603.49 to US$594.11, a trim of about 1.6% that reflects a more cautious stance on the stock's pricing. This adjustment is consistent with a broader wave of reduced price targets, even as analysts debate how resilient QuickBooks and TurboTax are to AI risk and how much Intuit's own AI efforts could support future demand. As you read on, you will see how these cross currents are shaping the story around Intuit and what to watch as the...
